name: REVA UNIVERSITY
about: Established in 2012, REVA University is a forerunner in delivering technology-based education. Recognised as one of the Top 50 private universities in India, REVA University with exemplary infrastructure, strives to benchmark new milestones in modern education.

name: AICTE IDEA Lab
about: The IDEA Lab at REVA University is a state-of-the-art facility dedicated to fostering creativity, enhancing problem-solving abilities, and cultivating an entrepreneurial mindset among students, researchers, and faculty—driving innovation, design excellence and entrepreneurial growth. Equipped with advanced tools for digital fabrication, electronics development and 3D printing
